name: Swedish Pepparkaka Cookies (a Spice Cookie)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Orange juice, fresh or frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together.
2. Mix all ingredients thoroughly in a bowl.
3. Roll out the dough on a floured surface using cookie cutters to form desired shapes.
4. Place the cookies on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 10 minutes, or until lightly golden.
6. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
Note: For easier handling of the dough, place a piece of wax paper over the breadboard and use a cloth under the rolling pin. Dust the wax paper with flour before rolling out the dough to prevent sticking. After mixing the dough, chill it in the refrigerator for at least one hour before shaping and baking.
